description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine setdiagresdyn_2, and is implemented by a call to setdiagresdyn_2. This API is used to set the dynamic simulation annotation options in the active Slider diagram. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. setdiagresdyn(mode, contour)

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Specifies the simulation result/value to display. (input).

parameters.name: contour
parameters.description: Specifies the dynamic quantity to contour. (input).

mode.description: voltage violations as specified by SET_VOLTAGE_REC_CHECK and SET_VOLTAGE_DIP_CHECK.
